inputs.label: Numerator constant term (a0)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient a0 in numerator polynomial a0 + a1*x + a2*x^2

inputs.label: Numerator linear coefficient (a1)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient a1 in numerator polynomial a0 + a1*x + a2*x^2

inputs.label: Numerator quadratic coefficient (a2)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient a2 in numerator polynomial a0 + a1*x + a2*x^2

inputs.label: Denominator constant term (b0)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient b0 in denominator polynomial b0 + b1*x + b2*x^2

inputs.label: Denominator linear coefficient (b1)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient b1 in denominator polynomial b0 + b1*x + b2*x^2

inputs.label: Denominator quadratic coefficient (b2)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient b2 in denominator polynomial b0 + b1*x + b2*x^2

inputs.label: Approach point (x →)
inputs.businessContext: The value that x approaches to evaluate the limit

inputs.label: Epsilon (small number)
inputs.businessContext: Small increment for numerical approximation of left- and right-hand limits; use e.g., 1e-4 or smaller

outputs.primary: Approximate limit value (average of left and right)
breakdown: Absolute difference between left and right limits
